ground_truth.title: Shelving Furniture - Shelves for Storage
ground_truth.main_content:
Shelving furniture styles to suit all size spaces and needs

While many retailers have a small enough selection of shelves for storage that they can be easily browsed on one page, our extensive selection of hundreds of options can make it a little trickier to compare at-a-glance! Many shoppers prefer to start their shopping journey by focusing on one of the key collections within our shelving furniture, including…

- Cube storage: From singular cubes to 25-cube units, you can 'square away' your storage needs in an instant, from a tiny powder room to a sizable primary bedroom.
- Shelf units: These easily adapt to changing storage needs, and are sturdy enough to last many years. That means the same shelving furniture that stores your trophies in high school can store extra snacks in your first apartment, photos and books in your first real living room and diapers in your first nursery.
- Kitchen pantry storage: Find affordable solutions that meet your family's needs, keeping snacks, fresh kitchen towels, cooking utensils, small appliances and more at your fingertips for an easier life.
- Shelf storage: Don't shelve finding the right storage for you for another moment! Dive right into our full selection of shelving and see how simple getting your home decorated and organized can be. Browse metal shelves, wooden shelves and more.
- Bookcases: Whether you fill them with novels, history books, childrens' story books, cookbooks, or no books at all, our classic and modern bookcase selection is worth writing about!
- Wall shelves: Vertical storage space is often under-utilized, resulting in small spaces feeling cramped and cluttered even when largely organized. Free up some floor and tabletop space and give your room an airier look and feel with wall-mounted shelves for storage. You can even hang them at different heights to accommodate different family members, which results in a unique design touch as well.

Whether used freestanding, wall-mounted or as room divider, IKEA shelves for storage are just the beginning in adding practical convenience to any space. Personalize your shelving furniture to meet your unique needs with our ever-updated selection of drawers, baskets and more.

Safety Note: Many of our shelving furniture pieces must be secured to the wall with an appropriate wall anchoring device. Review the product details for specific safety and compliance information, and be sure to use fasteners suitable for the wall material in a given room.
